subject: Quarterly budget review
body: Hello team, please review the attached quarterly budget summary before Friday's finance meeting. Let me know if you need any clarification.

subject: Updated project timeline
body: Hi team, the client approved the revised timeline. Please update your tasks in the shared tracker before tomorrow morning.

subject: Office maintenance notice
body: Facilities will test the fire alarm system on Tuesday at 10 AM. No action is required unless you hear an extended evacuation announcement.

subject: HR benefits enrollment reminder
body: Open enrollment closes this week. Please log in through the official HR portal bookmarked on the intranet if you need to update your benefits selection.

subject: Urgent password reset required
body: Your corporate mailbox will be suspended today unless you confirm your password immediately using the secure link below.

subject: Invoice approval needed
body: We need you to process this confidential payment within the next 30 minutes. Reply with confirmation after sending the wire transfer.

subject: Document shared with you
body: A protected payroll document is waiting for your review. Download the attached file and enable macros to open it correctly.

subject: Congratulations employee reward
body: You have been selected for a surprise company gift card. Verify your account and claim the reward before it expires tonight.
